sentence_reviews.text: Predicted value is matched to reward plus discounted future value; it operationally connects Reinforcement learning and Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sutton & Barto RL book, Bellman equations and temporal-difference learning chapters; AIMA Chapter 22 reinforcement learning and Chapter 26 planning/control.
sentence_reviews.notes: The Bellman/TD target is directly supported; the explicit bridge to dynamical systems/control is a synthesis across RL and control sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sutton & Barto RL book, Bellman/TD learning as central RL material; AIMA Chapter 22 reinforcement learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: Bellman and TD objectives are directly part of reinforcement learning.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
